codeReview.summary: ToolLayer enum with priority ordering Builtin=0 < Plugin=1 < Runtime=2. Three separate HashMaps for builtin_tools, plugin_tools, runtime_tools. register_builtin(), register_plugin(), register_runtime() convenience methods. check_layer_conflicts() detects cross-layer conflicts. get() resolves in priority order: Runtime > Plugin > Builtin. 14 new tests for layer priority and conflict detection. 43 total registry tests pass.

summary: Feature PASSED review. Three-layer ToolRegistry correctly implemented with conflict detection. 43 tests pass.
